_comment: Copy to config.json next to server.py and edit values. Or point RETRY_WATCHDOG_CONFIG env var at a private path.

server._webhook_url_comment: Optional override for the URL that the Admin view considers 'this watchdog's webhook'. Use it when the daemon binds an internal port that's fronted by a portproxy (e.g. WSL2 bind 9094, externally reachable at 9095). Empty = auto-compute as http://localhost:<port>/webhook.

alert._comment: default_recipient is used when a cron has no per-cron alert_recipient set. sender_binary must be a CLI that accepts --account/--to/--subject/--body (e.g. gog-send).

sender_env._comment: Extra env vars passed to the sender subprocess. WSL2 + gog-send needs SSL_CERT_FILE.

heartbeat._comment: Scanner config. v0.2 uses interval_minutes + lookback_hours + runs_dir_path. v0.3 will add missed-run detection (uses grace_period_minutes + jobs_json_path).

_openclaw_instance_name_comment: Optional label shown in the UI header (e.g. 'C3PO', 'prod-east'). Distinguishes a watchdog instance from its hostname when you're running multiple watchdogs across machines. Leave empty to hide.

predicates._comment: v0.2 — per-cron predicate rules. After each successful run (status=ok), the heartbeat scanner evaluates every predicate; the FIRST failed predicate triggers the same retry-or-alert flow as a webhook failure. Catches the case where the cron reports status=ok but didn't actually do its work. Key is cron UUID.
predicates._path_placeholders: {TODAY} and {YESTERDAY} resolve to YYYY-MM-DD in server.timezone

00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000.description: Output file must have been written within 30 min and be at least 100 bytes
At least one record has a non-null result
At least one pick written by the daily-sports-report source
Rolling log file must have grown since last scan

healthchecks._comment: v0.2 placeholder — wired in v0.2.x. Pre-retry checks: if any healthcheck fails when a webhook failure comes in, the watchdog skips the retry (avoids retrying into a broken dependency) and fires a dependency-unhealthy alert instead.

00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000.description: Upstream model server must be responding
